title: Publications | Stats NZ
content:
## 2018 Census вЂ“ NZ.Stat tables
2018 Census data about people and dwellings grouped by topics.

## Census data shows employment recovery post 2008 global financial crisis
Newly released data from the 2018 Census shows positive trends for MДЃori and Pacific peoplesвЂ™ employment after the global financial crisis (GFC).

## Newly released census data shows Christchurch CBD bouncing back
Newly released data from the 2018 Census shows that the Christchurch central business district (CBD) is bouncing back after the 2010/2011 earthquakes, with more than 11,000 additional workers in the CBD than at the time of the 2013 Census.

## Stats NZ launches data visualisation competition
A competition encouraging Kiwis to create cool visualisations with census data has just been launched.

## Education outcomes improving for MДЃori and Pacific peoples
Young MДЃori and Pacific students are leaving the education system more qualified than older MДЃori and Pacific people.

## Statistical area 1 dataset for 2018 Census вЂ“ updates and corrections
Lists corrections and updates made to the statistical area 1 dataset since initial publication on 16 December 2019.

## Customer update on 2018 Census data and activities вЂ“ May 2020
Provides updates about 2018 Census data quality rating changes and 2018 Census data and products released over the last quarter.

## 2018 Census totals by topic вЂ“ national highlights (updated)
2018 Census totals by topic вЂ“ national highlightsВ shows national totals of finer details about New Zealand's population and dwellings.

## Families and households in the 2018 Census: Data sources, family coding, and data quality
Describes the data sources and family coding process used to produce 2018 Census household and family information, and summarises our detailed assessment of the quality of this data.

## 2018 Census data allows users to dive deep into New Zealand's diversity
The changing face of New Zealand can be seen in the 2018 Census data released recently.

## Where do over-65s live?
New ZealandвЂ™s older population is among those most at risk of severe illness from the coronavirus (COVID-19).

## Statistical area 1 dataset for 2018 Census вЂ“ updated March 2020
Statistical area 1 dataset for 2018 Census contains counts at statistical area 1 (SA1) and other geographic levels for selected variables from the 2018, 2013, and 2006 censuses. The geographies correspond to 2018 boundaries.
